---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea to improve Quantframe
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you want.

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or frustration this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you considered.

## Use Cases

Who benefits from this feature, and how?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots here.
